name: provider-dashboard-block
title: Provider Dashboard
description: A multi-patient clinician command center — an optional KPI strip over the roster, today's agenda, task worklist, alerts feed, and inbox. DashboardShell + DashboardGrid of M2 panels.

props.name: stats
props.description: Optional KPI strip across the top.

clinicalNotes: This is the shift-start view, so it foregrounds triage: the acuity-sorted roster leads, the alerts feed sits beside it, and the KPI strip answers 'how busy am I' at a glance. Each embedded panel keeps its own safety ordering (roster by acuity, alerts by severity, tasks by priority, inbox by unread) — the block never re-sorts clinical data, it only arranges the panels. Wire the alert/task/message handlers to your store so acknowledged work leaves the surface.
notes: Layer-M3 block (B-2). Client component. Composes 5 M2 panels + a StatTile strip.
